title: Oral presentation: handling questions
subtitle: Respond when challenged.
overview: Questions are part of B2 speaking.
Buy time, clarify, answer, and admit limits.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: If I understand the question correctly...
I do not have exact data, but...

items.es: Es una pregunta interesante y no tiene una respuesta simple.
items.en: That is an interesting question and it does not have a simple answer.

items.es: Si entiendo bien la pregunta, usted se refiere al coste de la medida.
items.en: If I understand the question correctly, you are referring to the cost of the measure.

items.es: No tengo datos exactos, pero creo que la tendencia es clara.
items.en: I do not have exact data, but I think the trend is clear.

items.es: Respondería que depende del contexto local.
items.en: I would answer that it depends on the local context.

items.es: Es un punto que habría que investigar con más detalle.
items.en: It is a point that would need to be researched in more detail.
